backward_compatibility.rationale: New additive feature — no existing GUI to maintain backward compatibility with. CLI unchanged.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: No old code to replace — this is additive

option_selection.rationale: yen-go-sensei Fork with Engine Bridge — unanimously approved by governance re-election (Decision 3). Scope change: interactive play required, 200MB deps acceptable, anti-refactor is dominant constraint. Fork yen-go-sensei, replace TF.js engine with Python SSE bridge. ~500 lines new/changed, ~5000+ lines reused as-is.
